zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Somery於大約1191年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，她的父親Ralph de Somery41歲，母親Margaret Crassus30歲。她於1217年與Thomas de Berkeley在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1276年5月29日在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年86歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭布里斯托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Somery于大约1191年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Ralph de Somery41岁，母亲Margaret Crassus30岁。她于1217年与Thomas de Berkeley在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1276年5月29日在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年86岁，埋葬在英国英格兰布里斯托。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Somery was born about 1191, in Gloucestershire, England, her father, Ralph de Somery, was 41 and her mother, Margaret Crassus, was 30. She married Thomas de Berkeley in 1217, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 29 May 1276, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in Bristol, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Somery est née environ 1191, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Somery, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margaret Crassus, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Berkeley en 1217, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 mai 1276, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Somery um 1191 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph de Somery 41 und ihre Mutter Margaret Crassus 30. Sie hat 1217 in Gloucestershire, England Thomas de Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Mai 1276 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Bristol, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Somery è nata il circa 1191 nel Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Ralph de Somery, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Margaret Crassus, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Berkeley nel 1217, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 maggio 1276, nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Someryが約1191年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph de Someryは41歳，母Margaret Crassusは30歳であった。1217年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでThomas de Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1276年5月29日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルで86歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブリストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Somery(이)가 대략 1191년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Somery(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Crassus(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1217년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Thomas de Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1276년 5월 29일 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Somery nasceu aproximadamente 1191, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Somery, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Crassus, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Berkeley em 1217, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de maio de 1276, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Somery родилась около 1191 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph de Somery было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Crassus, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Berkeley в 1217 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 29 мая 1276 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Somery nació aproximadamente 1191, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Somery, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Margaret Crassus, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Thomas de Berkeley en 1217, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1276, en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
